title: phegopteris angustifolia
intro: Phegopteris angustifolia, also known as the linear-leaved lady fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris angustifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of tea or infusions, are often used to treat these conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
